# JustFreeAI — AI Tool Directory

> The internet's most curated directory of free AI tools, all with genuine free tiers. Every tool listed has a genuine free tier — no trials, no credit cards required. Updated weekly.

## What is JustFreeAI?

JustFreeAI (https://justfreeai.com) is a hand-curated directory of 39+ AI tools that are genuinely free to use. Every tool has a real, meaningful free tier verified by our team.

## All Listed Tools

- [ChatGPT](https://justfreeai.com/tool/chatgpt-free.html): The world's most popular AI assistant — free forever. Free tier: Unlimited GPT-4o mini, generous GPT-4o daily limit, DALL·E image gen, memory
- [Claude](https://justfreeai.com/tool/claude-ai.html): Thoughtful, nuanced AI for writing, coding and analysis. Free tier: Daily Claude Sonnet access, 200K token context, file uploads, projects
- [Gemini](https://justfreeai.com/tool/gemini-google.html): Google's AI — free, multimodal, and deeply integrated. Free tier: Unlimited Gemini 1.5 Flash, image understanding, Google Docs/Sheets integration
- [Perplexity AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/perplexity-ai.html): AI-powered search that actually cites its sources. Free tier: Unlimited searches, source citations, GPT-4o and Claude on free tier
- [NotebookLM](https://justfreeai.com/tool/notebooklm.html): Google's AI research assistant — entirely free. Free tier: Completely free — no paid tier exists. Unlimited notebooks, 50 sources each.
- [Bolt.new](https://justfreeai.com/tool/bolt-new.html): Full-stack web apps from a prompt, in your browser. Free tier: 150K tokens/day free, deploy to Netlify for free
- [Microsoft Copilot](https://justfreeai.com/tool/copilot-microsoft.html): Microsoft's free AI — powered by GPT-4o. Free tier: Unlimited GPT-4o, DALL·E image gen, Bing web search — all free
- [Mistral Le Chat](https://justfreeai.com/tool/mistral-le-chat.html): Europe's best AI — blazing fast and free. Free tier: Unlimited Mistral Large access, web search, image generation
- [HuggingChat](https://justfreeai.com/tool/hugging-face-chat.html): Open-source AI chat — no account needed. Free tier: Unlimited — completely free, no account needed for basic use
- [Poe](https://justfreeai.com/tool/poe-quora.html): Access 100+ AI models in one free app. Free tier: Daily message limits across 100+ AI models including GPT-4o and Claude
- [Cursor](https://justfreeai.com/tool/cursor-free.html): AI-powered code editor — free for individuals. Free tier: 2,000 completions/month, 50 slow premium requests — free forever
- [GitHub Copilot Free](https://justfreeai.com/tool/github-copilot-free.html): Microsoft's AI coding assistant — now has a free tier. Free tier: 2,000 completions/month, 50 chat messages, GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet
- [v0 by Vercel](https://justfreeai.com/tool/v0-vercel.html): Generate beautiful UI components with a single prompt. Free tier: 10 free generations/day, full component library access
- [Replit](https://justfreeai.com/tool/replit-free.html): Code, build, and deploy apps — AI included free. Free tier: Free Replit AI with daily messages, unlimited public repls, basic hosting
- [Phind](https://justfreeai.com/tool/phind-ai.html): AI search engine built for developers. Free tier: Unlimited searches, code examples, web search — completely free
- [Consensus](https://justfreeai.com/tool/consensus-ai.html): AI search engine for scientific research papers. Free tier: 20 searches/day, full paper citations, evidence synthesis
- [You.com](https://justfreeai.com/tool/you-com.html): Private AI search and assistant — totally free. Free tier: Unlimited AI searches and chat, image generation, private mode
- [Ideogram](https://justfreeai.com/tool/ideogram.html): AI image gen that nails text inside images. Free tier: 10 slow generations/day, unlimited slow-queue access
- [Adobe Firefly](https://justfreeai.com/tool/adobe-firefly.html): Adobe's AI image gen — commercially safe output. Free tier: 25 generative credits/month, commercial use allowed
- [Canva AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/canva-ai.html): Design anything with AI — free for individuals. Free tier: 500 AI image generations/month, Magic Write 50 uses/month, background remover
- [Krea AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/krea-ai.html): Real-time AI image generation as you type. Free tier: 35 free daily generations, real-time canvas, upscaling tools
- [Suno](https://justfreeai.com/tool/suno-music.html): Generate full songs with lyrics from a text prompt. Free tier: 50 credits/day (~10 songs), non-commercial use
- [ElevenLabs](https://justfreeai.com/tool/elevenlabs-free.html): Hyper-realistic AI voices for any content. Free tier: 10,000 characters/month, 3 custom voices, 30+ languages
- [Udio](https://justfreeai.com/tool/udio-music.html): Generate studio-quality music from text descriptions. Free tier: 1,200 credits/month (~300 song clips), non-commercial use
- [Descript](https://justfreeai.com/tool/descript-free.html): Edit audio and video by editing the transcript. Free tier: 3 hours of transcription/month, unlimited projects, AI filler word removal
- [Kling AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/kling-ai.html): Text-to-video AI with a surprisingly generous free tier. Free tier: 66 free credits/day, up to 5s HD videos
- [Luma Dream Machine](https://justfreeai.com/tool/luma-dream-machine.html): Cinematic AI video generation from text or images. Free tier: 30 free video generations/month, 720p HD output
- [Pika](https://justfreeai.com/tool/pika-labs.html): Create and edit videos with AI in seconds. Free tier: 250 credits/month free, HD video generation
- [Runway](https://justfreeai.com/tool/runway-gen3.html): Professional video AI used by filmmakers. Free tier: 125 lifetime credits on signup, video generation and editing
- [Gamma](https://justfreeai.com/tool/gamma-app.html): Beautiful AI presentations in seconds. Free tier: 400 AI credits on signup, unlimited views, export to PDF/PPT
- [Tome](https://justfreeai.com/tool/tome-ai.html): AI-powered storytelling and presentations. Free tier: Unlimited pages and presentations, AI generation, sharing
- [Napkin AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/napkin-ai.html): Turn text into beautiful diagrams automatically. Free tier: Free forever plan with unlimited public diagrams
- [Otter.ai](https://justfreeai.com/tool/otter-ai.html): AI meeting transcription and notes — free forever. Free tier: 300 transcription minutes/month, AI meeting summaries, Zoom/Meet integration
- [Notion AI](https://justfreeai.com/tool/notion-ai-free.html): AI writing and summarization inside your workspace. Free tier: 20 free AI responses to try; Notion free plan (without AI) is excellent
- [Grammarly](https://justfreeai.com/tool/grammarly-free.html): AI writing assistant — free for core features. Free tier: Unlimited grammar/spelling checks, tone detection, browser extension
- [Writesonic](https://justfreeai.com/tool/writesonic-free.html): AI content writer with a usable free tier. Free tier: 10,000 words/month free, 100+ AI writing templates
- [ChatPDF](https://justfreeai.com/tool/chatpdf.html): Chat with any PDF document — free. Free tier: 2 PDFs/day (up to 120 pages each), 50 questions per PDF
- [Soundraw](https://justfreeai.com/tool/soundraw.html): AI music for creators — free to compose. Free tier: Generate and preview unlimited music free — pay only to download
- [Mixo](https://justfreeai.com/tool/mixo-ai.html): Launch an AI-built landing page in seconds. Free tier: 1 live AI-generated website, email collection, SEO basics

## Categories

### AI Assistant
- ChatGPT: The world's most popular AI assistant — free forever
- Claude: Thoughtful, nuanced AI for writing, coding and analysis
- Gemini: Google's AI — free, multimodal, and deeply integrated
- Microsoft Copilot: Microsoft's free AI — powered by GPT-4o
- Mistral Le Chat: Europe's best AI — blazing fast and free
- HuggingChat: Open-source AI chat — no account needed
- Poe: Access 100+ AI models in one free app

### AI Search
- Perplexity AI: AI-powered search that actually cites its sources
- Phind: AI search engine built for developers
- Consensus: AI search engine for scientific research papers
- You.com: Private AI search and assistant — totally free

### Research
- NotebookLM: Google's AI research assistant — entirely free
- ChatPDF: Chat with any PDF document — free

### Coding
- Bolt.new: Full-stack web apps from a prompt, in your browser
- Cursor: AI-powered code editor — free for individuals
- GitHub Copilot Free: Microsoft's AI coding assistant — now has a free tier
- v0 by Vercel: Generate beautiful UI components with a single prompt
- Replit: Code, build, and deploy apps — AI included free

### Image Generation
- Ideogram: AI image gen that nails text inside images
- Adobe Firefly: Adobe's AI image gen — commercially safe output
- Canva AI: Design anything with AI — free for individuals
- Krea AI: Real-time AI image generation as you type

### Audio & Music
- Suno: Generate full songs with lyrics from a text prompt
- ElevenLabs: Hyper-realistic AI voices for any content
- Udio: Generate studio-quality music from text descriptions
- Descript: Edit audio and video by editing the transcript
- Soundraw: AI music for creators — free to compose

### Video
- Kling AI: Text-to-video AI with a surprisingly generous free tier
- Luma Dream Machine: Cinematic AI video generation from text or images
- Pika: Create and edit videos with AI in seconds
- Runway: Professional video AI used by filmmakers

### Presentations
- Gamma: Beautiful AI presentations in seconds
- Tome: AI-powered storytelling and presentations

### Productivity
- Napkin AI: Turn text into beautiful diagrams automatically
- Otter.ai: AI meeting transcription and notes — free forever
- Notion AI: AI writing and summarization inside your workspace
- Mixo: Launch an AI-built landing page in seconds

### Writing
- Grammarly: AI writing assistant — free for core features
- Writesonic: AI content writer with a usable free tier
